query_text: When should a shared cache revalidate a cached response using validators like ETag?
expected_answer: revalidate the cached entry with the origin when a validator such as ETag or Last-Modified is present

query_text: What is the role of WAL in PostgreSQL crash recovery?
expected_answer: durability across crashes by replaying committed records from the log

query_text: How does the OAuth2 client credentials grant obtain an access token?
expected_answer: client_id and client_secret to the token endpoint

query_text: Why might a team choose gRPC over REST for internal service-to-service calls?
expected_answer: binary framing and HTTP/2 multiplexing can reduce per-call overhead

query_text: What problem do idempotency keys solve in payment APIs?
expected_answer: duplicate submissions of the same logical payment intent

query_text: What happens during the TLS handshake before application data is encrypted?
expected_answer: Cipher suite negotiation and key exchange establish shared session keys

query_text: What tradeoff does an HNSW graph index make for approximate nearest neighbor search?
expected_answer: build-time memory and insertion cost for faster query latency at high recall

query_text: Why index structured log fields instead of only storing raw text lines?
expected_answer: filter and aggregate by service, trace_id, or error_code without parsing ad hoc
